editingPhilosophy.summary: This editor prioritizes emotional and rhythmic impact above all. They use precise, beat-synced cuts and carefully selected character moments to translate the song's energy curve directly into a visual narrative, creating a powerful fusion of sight and sound.
editingPhilosophy.rhythmContract: Every major beat will be honored with a cut, often accented with a visual effect. The viewer can trust the rhythm and anticipate the impacts, making the experience both predictable and satisfying.
editingPhilosophy.signatureMove: The 'impact frame' - a rapid sequence of a few static, high-impact frames from the anime, flashed on screen for 1-2 frames each, perfectly synced to a drum roll or a rapid series of beats.
